_comment: Dynatrace Workflow — import via Automations > Workflows > Upload. Requires env var GITHUB_PAT with repo + workflow scope.
title: Auto-Remediation: Payment Service Failure Rate Rollback
description: Detects high failure rate on payment-service via Davis and triggers GitHub Actions to reset the failure rate to zero.

trigger_github_rollback.name: trigger_github_rollback
trigger_github_rollback.description: Trigger GitHub Actions deploy-bad-release workflow with rollback action via repository_dispatch
